zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线承压震荡走弱
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持在1710附近窄幅整理，价格持续运行于20日均线下方，整体结构偏弱，短线多头动能不足，市场进入震荡整理阶段。

技术指标方面，MACD柱体维持负值并小幅走扩，空头动能仍占优，若无明显放量反弹，短期趋势难以快速扭转，多空分歧较为明显。

下方支撑关注1700整数关口及1685区域，上方阻力位于1725均线与1740压力区，若跌破支撑则可能延续下探结构。中

操作上建议以反弹高空为主思路，若价格反抽至1725附近可关注承压信号，止损设置在1740上方，控制仓位等待方向确认。为宜

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum vs US Dollar is currently trading around 1710, showing very limited intraday movement and a neutral-to-slightly bearish tone. Price action remains compressed near the lower end of its recent micro-range, reflecting indecision in the market. The inability to reclaim the 1720–1725 area suggests sellers are still dominant in short-term control, while volatility remains subdued, which often precedes a stronger directional move once consolidation resolves.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. MACD is firmly negative at -15.79, indicating sustained bearish momentum, even though the lack of a visible signal line value limits crossover interpretation. The absence of RSI data reduces precision in overbought or oversold assessment, but trading below the 20-day SMA at 1725.75 confirms a weakening short-term structure. Overall, Ethereum continues to consolidate with a mild downside bias rather than establishing a clear trend.

Key support is found immediately at 1709–1710, aligned with the current range floor, followed by a psychological level at 1700 and deeper support near 1680 if breakdown occurs. On the upside, resistance is first at 1712, then stronger resistance at the SMA20 around 1725. A sustained break above 1725 would be required to shift momentum back toward a more constructive bullish structure and open room for recovery.

Trading conditions favor a range-based approach until a clear breakout emerges. Short-term traders may consider fading moves into resistance with tight risk control above 1725, while bullish positions should wait for confirmation above the SMA20 before entering. On breakdown below 1709, downside momentum could accelerate toward 1700. Risk management is essential given the tight consolidation and potential for sharp volatility expansion once the range resolves.
